The current invocation preserved those coherent bytes, reran the transaction matrix at 8/8, passed the exact and complete BUG-002 browser runs at 1/1 each, passed the complete system-Chrome inventory at 73/73, passed the unchanged pair validator and complete selftest at 497/0, and passed the declared implementation/governance/integrity gates. Payload identity and exact 751b85d snapshot/history blobs were proven, protected dirty hashes/index/status remained unchanged, and no path was staged or committed. SCOPE-01 remains In Progress with no terminal or certification claim; unresolved historical RED provenance review and independent verification are routed to bubbles.test.

Adopted the expanded ten-case functional matrix and authorized immutable-HEAD RED replay, recovered the original pre-edit RED rows from the structured tool log, and revalidated the latest hashes. Functional tests passed 10/10, the repaired pair validator passed, the repository selftest passed 497/0, focused browser checks passed 1/1, the complete Playwright inventory passed 73/73, final authenticity and pollution probes passed, and all blocking implementation gates passed. The implementation-reality scan retained one non-blocking design-fallback discovery warning with zero violations. SCOPE-01 and BUG-002 remain in progress for independent test, validate, and audit ownership.

Focused BUG-002 verification passed, including immutable-HEAD RED, current 10/10 functional GREEN, unchanged pair validator, 497/0 selftest, exact and complete BUG-002 browser rows, and test-phase gates. The required exact complete system-Chrome reliability recheck then failed with 72 passed and 1 failed in the Feature 007 qualified-series/RLVALID shared-behavior canary because seriesEnvelope was undefined. The isolated exact title passed 1/1, classifying order or concurrency sensitivity. Test completion is not claimed; rework is routed to bubbles.implement.

failures.summary: 497 passed, 0 failed after exact snapshot/history repair; independently verified, while overall test completion remains blocked by the browser inventory instability.
Exact TP-01-10 reliability recheck: 72 passed, 1 failed; Feature 007 shared-behavior canary read undefined seriesEnvelope. Isolated exact title passed 1/1.
